attempts.reflection: You need to obtain a stone_pickaxe before attempting to mine iron_ore and cobblestone. Specifically, after mining an oak_log and crafting sticks, use the sticks and oak_planks to create a crafting_table. Then, craft a wooden_pickaxe and upgrade it to a stone_pickaxe using cobblestone. After obtaining a stone_pickaxe, you can mine iron_ore and cobblestone, which are necessary to craft an iron_hoe. Ensure you complete these steps in the correct order to avoid looping and resource shortages.

attempts.reflection: You repeatedly tried to craft a stone_pickaxe without having the necessary materials, which led to a loop of failure. Additionally, you attempted to craft a crafting_table before having enough oak_planks. To avoid these issues, first ensure you have all required materials before attempting to craft any item. Specifically, craft the crafting_table using 4 oak_planks (Steps 99-100), then use it to craft sticks (Step 98-100). After that, you can proceed to craft the stone_pickaxe (Step 84) and then attempt to craft the iron_hoe (Step 101: craft_iron_hoe [-3 iron_ingot, -2 stick, +1 iron_hoe]).
